Container.Name: altHuntarrrscript
Container.Overview: Small, non-root Sonarr/Radarr helper that gradually submits missing and cutoff-upgrade searches. No web UI or listening port. Starts in dry-run mode.
Container.Requires: Create /mnt/user/appdata/altHuntarrr/config/config.json from examples/config.example.json. Keep general.state_dir=/data/state and general.log_dir=/data/logs.

Config.Name: User ID (PUID)
Config.Description: Runtime user ID. Unraid nobody is 99.

Config.Name: Group ID (PGID)
Config.Description: Runtime group ID. Unraid users is 100.

Config.Name: Configuration
Config.Description: Directory containing config.json and optional secrets.json. On first start the container creates an example config and exits; edit it and restart.

Config.Name: Persistent data
Config.Description: Persistent processed state, counters, and logs.

Config.Name: Dry run
Config.Description: Keep true for initial validation. No command POSTs or state/counter consumption occur.

Config.Name: Show candidates
Config.Description: Print selected candidates to the container log. Also forces dry-run behavior.

Config.Name: Sonarr API key
Config.Description: API key used by the default Sonarr instance. Add custom masked variables only when configuring multiple Sonarr instances.

Config.Name: Radarr API key
Config.Description: API key used by the default Radarr instance. Add custom masked variables only when configuring multiple Radarr instances.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone. State and hourly caps always use UTC.
